title: Balrogchar's Modernized Creeper
description: The iconic monster, updated for a plethora of trees in a variety of environments.
body:
![Balrogchar's Modernized Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5XXGUt7O/images/2ee03aeba2ea7192f99df70c84f4d45baaf1816a.png)

**- Entity Texture Features in use! Optifine, ETF, or equivalent recommended!-**

There are a variety of creeper overhauls available, but I could find none that followed the original ethos of using both texture and color of the existing foliage. So I decided not only to fill this void, but to do so thoroughly, taking into account every tree and biome combination that naturally occurs in the overworld.

![Overlooking a Birch Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5XXGUt7O/images/59e3c19088aaf553b96ba8805f0f74ca79ee2924.png)

Now you'll have over twenty different varieties of explosive vegetable matter to admire! …Assuming they don't see you first, of course.
